text:
NEW: Watchboard now visualizes Artemis II's journey to the Moon in 3D.

Real-time spacecraft tracking, mission telemetry HUD (altitude, velocity, distance to Moon), and a 632-waypoint trajectory from launch to splashdown.

Watchboard now features a full 3D visualization of NASA's Artemis II lunar flyby mission.

Built on CesiumJS with 632 pre-computed trajectory waypoints covering the 10-day mission from launch at Kennedy Space Center to Pacific splashdown. The globe renders Earth, the Moon, and an animated Orion spacecraft tracking its position in real-time.

A Mission Control-style HUD overlay displays live telemetry: altitude from Earth, velocity, distance to Moon, mission elapsed time, and current mission phase with a progress timeline.

The visualization activates automatically when trajectory data exists for a tracker — the same architecture can support future space missions.

Explore: https://watchboard.dev/artemis-2/globe/

#Artemis #NASA #SpaceExploration #Watchboard
Trump warns US will strike Iran "extremely hard over the next two to three weeks" — the most explicit military timeline yet as Day 35 of the war enters a new escalation phase.

judge.comment: High-impact breaking news with verified quote.

factChecks.claim: Trump warned strike Iran extremely hard next 2-3 weeks

Russia: zero net territorial gains in March 2026 — first time in 2.5 years.

Day 1,499: 213 engagements. ~1.3M Russian losses. Ukraine recaptured ~9 sq km.
